title: Aurora, 60835, Sparkle Tales, Sparkle Unicorn, Soft Toy, 7In, Soft Toy, Silver
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: From Aurora's highly popular Sparkle Tales Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Gorgeous Sparkle accent materials, with glitter eyes
Children will love this cute, colourful and hugely collectable character
description: Product Description The Sparkle Tales Kingdom is a fantasy world where all kinds of magical creatures live. It is a place where fairy tales and imaginations are free to roam. The Sparkle Tales World consists of forests, desert, sea and a magical castle. Sparkle Unicorn lives in the City of Once Upon A Time within the Sparkle Tales Kingdom with the other Sparkle Tales unicorns. Sparkle has a beautiful white body with a light grey mane and tail which is super-soft and perfect for cuddles. She has a gorgeous silver sparkly material on her hooves and ears which compliments her beautiful sparkly eyes. Sparkle loves hanging out with her fellow unicorns and has many friends throughout the Sparkle Tales Kingdom. Collect them all. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Box Contains 1 x Soft Toy
